title: Panic Button
writer: Hal Biller, Morton Friedman, Ron Gorton
actors: Maurice Chevalier, Eleanor Parker, Jayne Mansfield
plot: A businessman plans to solve his tax problems by financing a film version of "Romeo and Juliet". He hires Maurice Chevalier and Jayne Mansfield to play the title roles, and Akim Tamiroff to direct. The finished film is shown at th...
